code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test16-JUN-2022Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating possible renal impairment. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glucosuria, bilirubinuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance and color, supporting renal dysfunction and possible tubular damage. Hemoglobin A1c is low, suggesting recent hypoglycemia or anemia. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment for underlying causes of renal impairment and abnormal urine findings.
